overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy futuristic cyberpunk city. The camera moves along a busy multi-lane street with futuristic vehicles passing by, then turns into a narrow service alleyway lined with construction barriers and scaffolding. The scene features tall buildings with large digital billboards and wet, reflective ground surfaces throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown arterial street with digital advertising towers

events.description: futuristic black sedan passes by from left to right on the wet road
yellow six-wheeled sports car drives past followed by other vehicles
turns left off the main street into a narrow service alley between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk observing futuristic traffic and towering glass buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic green sedan driving past on the rain-slicked road
blue truck with illuminated accents passing by in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall distinctive building with yellow facade and black grid pattern windows
large pink digital screen displaying advertisements on the building face
white illuminated billboard with graphics mounted on building
modern reflective glass skyscraper with multiple floors visible
tall black pole with orange fixture and traffic sensors attached

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide futuristic city street during heavy rain, with wet reflective pavement and futuristic vehicles passing by. The distinctive yellow grid building dominates the center view while digital billboards illuminate the sides. The camera moves steadily forward past street lights and traffic barriers, observing the moderate flow of cyberpunk-style traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with construction scaffolding and utility equipment

events.description: enters narrow alleyway leaving the main street traffic behind, passing under building overhang
passes large green industrial dumpsters temporarily blocking the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: turning left into the confined alley and walking forward past construction barriers and ventilation units

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing walking ahead in the alleyway distance

entered.detail: extensive metal scaffolding structure with cross-bracing along the left wall
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking vehicle access to the alley
massive illuminated digital screen displaying fashion advertisements on the right wall
large green industrial waste containers with trash scattered nearby
black industrial HVAC unit with warning labels and vents

segments.scene_description: Having turned into a narrow service alley, the scene becomes enclosed with scaffolding on the left and large digital screens on the right. The space is sheltered from the rain but still wet, with construction barriers and utility equipment lining the path. The camera continues forward through the confined corridor, passing industrial dumpsters and ventilation units while approaching a distant figure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-slicked futuristic thoroughfare into the claustrophobic confines of a service alley. It begins by gliding along a broad city street under heavy rain, where wet pavement reflects the glow of digital billboards and a prominent yellow grid building. As the camera moves steadily past street lights and flowing cyberpunk traffic, it turns away from the open road and enters a narrow corridor. The scene then shifts from the expansive cityscape to an enclosed space sheltered from the rain, lined with scaffolding, construction barriers, and industrial utility equipment. Finally, the camera pushes forward through this confined path, passing ventilation units and dumpsters while closing in on a distant figure.
